textByHash.79c564f83cc200775df29d76a740419ff3ef1d9b: It's terrible isn't it. Surely it is because we let the holy Saradominist priest die.
textByHash.7e5211794b88470668cc9551c293a3215a1fc165: It still shocks me that the spirits of the river would put such a nasty curse on us for something so small.
